title: Head of Revenue Operations
location: New York, NY (with Tel Aviv HQ collaboration)
description: Finout, a cloud cost-management SaaS company with 100+ people across Tel Aviv and New York, seeks a Head of Revenue Operations to build and scale the operational backbone of its GTM engine. Reporting to the CRO, this hands-on leadership role requires 7+ years in Revenue Operations, Sales Ops, or Strategy within high-growth B2B SaaS, experience scaling beyond $30M+ ARR, deep Salesforce administration expertise, and strong cross-functional leadership across Sales, Marketing, Finance, and HR. Globally distributed team experience is essential.
score_reason: Exceptional match across all dimensions: Head of Revenue Operations aligns perfectly with Omri's target roles, B2B SaaS fintech company matches strong fit profile, 15+ years vastly exceeds 7+ requirement, and Tel Aviv HQ with NY base accommodates his location preferences for Israel-based collaboration.

With your 15+ years building RevOps at scale and deep Salesforce expertise, you'd be uniquely positioned to architect their operational backbone while working across distributed Tel Aviv and New York teams. I'd love to explore if this aligns with your next chapter.

title: RevOps Manager

With deep HubSpot and Salesforce experience plus hands-on data integration work, I'm curious how you're thinking about the technical infrastructure stack as Instrumentl scales—happy to explore whether this is the right fit.
